name: Pumpkin-Cream Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Make Graham Cracker Crust: In a medium bowl, lightly toss graham cracker crumbs with melted butter until well mixed. Press the mixture into the bottom and sides (not the rim) of a 9-inch pie plate. Refrigerate.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F.
3. Make Pumpkin-Cheese Filling: In a large bowl, combine cream cheese, sugar, flour, lemon peel, orange peel, vanilla extract, eggs, egg yolks, and pumpkin. Beat until smooth. Turn the mixture into the crust.
4. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the center is firm when gently shaken.
5. Meanwhile, make Sour Cream Topping: In a small bowl, combine sour cream, sugar, and vanilla extract. Mix well.
6. Spread the topping evenly over the pie.
7. Bake for an additional 10 minutes.
8. Let the pie cool completely on a wire rack for about 1 hour before refrigerating overnight.
